summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 4 features completed. All 19 backend API tests passed, all frontend UI features verified working correctly. Admin can create visitor-role users, visitors are redirected to /besucher-events and can search for guests/view menu, staff page has new fields (notes, vehicle, license_plate), menu page allows adding food/drinks with price/allergens, check-in page shows compact rows.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up: TEST_ prefixed users, guests, staff, and menu items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully implemented and working. Test credentials: Admin (admin/admin123), Visitor (gast/gast123). All navigation tabs present: Gäste, Mitarbeiter, Tischplan, Einlass, Menü, Export. Visitor view has Sitzplan and Menü tabs with guest search functionality.

features_verified.admin_create_visitor_user: PASS - Admin can create visitor-role users via /admin page
features_verified.visitor_event_list: PASS - Visitor sees all events with guest counts
features_verified.visitor_search_guest: PASS - Search functionality finds guests and shows table number
features_verified.visitor_view_menu: PASS - Menu tab shows food and drinks (empty if none added)
features_verified.staff_page_new_fields: PASS - Staff form has notes, vehicle, license_plate fields
features_verified.staff_display_new_fields: PASS - Staff list shows notes, vehicle, license plate badges
features_verified.menu_page_add_food: PASS - Can add Essen with name, description, price, allergens
features_verified.menu_page_add_drink: PASS - Can add Getränke with name, description, price
features_verified.menu_categories: PASS - Separate sections for Essen and Getränke
features_verified.guest_page_new_fields: PASS - Guest form has notes, vehicle, license_plate fields
features_verified.guest_display_new_fields: PASS - Guest list shows notes, vehicle, license plate badges
features_verified.checkin_page_compact: PASS - Compact rows with initials, name, type badge (E/K), staff badge (MA)
features_verified.checkin_toggle: PASS - Click to toggle check-in status, shows strikethrough and green check
features_verified.checkin_progress: PASS - Progress bar shows percentage, stats show Eingetroffen/Ausstehend/Gesamt
features_verified.navigation_tabs: PASS - All tabs present: Gäste, Mitarbeiter, Tischplan, Einlass, Menü, Export
features_verified.dashboard_visitor_view_button: PASS - Eye icon button opens visitor view for events
